description_long: This stool features a simple, modern design with a round, flat seat and a single central pedestal leg that extends down to a wide, circular base. The entire structure appears to be made of a dark, possibly black material with a subtle wood grain or textured finish on the seat. The pedestal and base are smooth and cylindrical, providing stability and a sleek appearance. There are no visible backrests, footrests, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing its minimalist aesthetic. The stool is compact and likely intended for use in public or urban environments such as cafes, waiting areas, or outdoor plazas. Its sturdy construction suggests it can support the weight of an adult and withstand frequent use.
description: A minimalist, round black stool with a single pedestal leg and wide circular base, featuring a subtly textured seat. The design is sleek and modern, with no backrest or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, central pedestal, and wide circular base, all in a dark finish.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the uniform thickness of the seat and the smooth, straight pedestal leg.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the continuous curve of the seat and the symmetry of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the stool's simple, unadorned profile.
